title: ModuleNode
description: A zone learning node inside a module. Carries the four-field content contract (quick definition, explainer scope, connections, tag) established by the PE template.

local_id.description: The human-facing in-module ID, e.g. 'Z1.5'. Redundant with id; kept for rendering fidelity with legacy maps.

ordinal.description: Position within the zone's learning sequence.

tag.description: Node role. 'global' means this zone node is the home explainer of a global concept (global_id required).

global_id.description: If tag=='global', the G-number whose deep explainer lives here.

explainer_covers.description: Bulleted explainer scope, ordered basic → technical.

ref.description: Target reference: 'G{n}' for globals, '{module-slug}.z{zone}.{n}' for nodes (same or cross module).

note.description: Optional relationship annotation, e.g. 'clarify the difference'.

connects_to.description: Outbound graph edges. The authoritative source for graph.json — edges are derived from this field, never hand-authored elsewhere.

connects_to_raw.description: The original free-text 'Connects to.' line from the legacy markdown, preserved losslessly through migration. Removable after Milestone 2 sign-off.

gaps.description: The single canonical GAP mechanism. Replaces both legacy formats (inline 'GAP:' tags and consolidated Part 9 prose).

real_world_layer.description: Optional case/example annotation (e.g. 'PE in Action Case #2').

source.description: Source key from module.json sources list.
